title.en: Get to a higher difficulty level in a game
title.cn: Get to a higher difficulty level in a game

description.en: Booster will increase your basic power from minigames for 12 hours.
description.cn: Booster will increase your basic power from minigames for 12 hours.

description.pt: Booster will increase your basic power from minigames for 12 hours.

description.en: Bask in the radiant glow of Festive Rack 8, where the holiday lights weave a dazzling tapestry of joy
description.cn: Bask in the radiant glow of Festive Rack 8, where the holiday lights weave a dazzling tapestry of joy

description.en: Meet the LightBeat miner, the only device in the galaxy that mines cryptocurrency at lightspeed, slicing through blockchain algorithms like a lightsaber through a room full of stormtroopers. It’s so powerful, even the Dark Side is considering a switch to crypto!
description.cn: Meet the LightBeat miner, the only device in the galaxy that mines cryptocurrency at lightspeed, slicing through blockchain algorithms like a lightsaber through a room full of stormtroopers. It’s so powerful, even the Dark Side is considering a switch to crypto!

description.en: Hidden beneath cosmic depths, this miner echoes an ancient, fluid civilization. Glowing with otherworldly calm, it turns the silent pressure of the universe into flowing streams of crypto.

description.en: Towering across the crypto battlefield, this beast stomps through blocks with mechanical precision and unstoppable rhythm. Built like an AT-AT but driven by hunger for profit, it’s a walking force of ham-fueled domination—slow, steady, and absolutely relentless.
